license_terms: public domain (pre-1917 Imperial Russian government publication)
notes: Full archive.org item run 1904-1916 downloaded in its entirety (all 13 available years) per task instructions. These are official pre-Soviet Imperial statistics -- useful as a baseline predating both the USSR official series (narodnoe-khozyaistvo-yearbooks) and CIA reconstructions (cia-soviet-economy-assessments), letting comparisons span the late Tsarist, Soviet, and post-Soviet periods for the RUS/SUN comparator. Files are full-resolution OCR'd scans in Russian; largest file is 1905 at ~285MB (under the 500MB size-discipline cap). No English translation included in the PDFs themselves; archive.org item also hosts djvu.txt OCR text layers and abbyy.gz files not downloaded here (redundant with the PDF's embedded text layer).
